name: Glasgow (United Kingdom)
description: A white field bearing the coat of arms of Glasgow — including the tree, bird, fish and bell associated with St Mungo.
history: Based on the historic civic arms of Glasgow (granted by Lord Lyon in 1866); the four emblems recall the legend of St Mungo, the city's patron saint.

features.symbolism: the tree, bird, fish and bell of the legend of St Mungo, patron saint of Glasgow
